raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, there were XXXX charges on my credit card that were processed in Florida. I contacted the bank Citibank, and told them they are not mine. At that time they took them off my charge card. 

On XX/XX/XXXX. I received a notice in the mail that one of the charges was a valid charge. Again I called and said it is not mine. On the paperwork they sent it shows a name and address of a person who found my information somewhere and made XXXX charges. They charged me back for XXXX. I want Citibank to remove this charge from my account. I have called so many times. And still they do nothing. I am XXXX and feel that I am being discriminated again. That I am an old and they can take advantage of. 

Please help me with this problem. 

This person charged a card that was closed. Citibank should have not lets those charges go thru. They should have stopped this person from using this card ending in XXXX. This card was closed.
